# ============================================================================
# CELL 1: Imports, logging, Spark session
# ============================================================================

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, lit, regexp_extract
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
import logging

logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO, format='%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
logger = logging.getLogger()

spark = SparkSession.builder \
    .appName("STG Voters - Rewrite voters_postgresql") \
    .config("spark.sql.extensions", "io.delta.sql.DeltaSparkSessionExtension") \
    .config("spark.sql.catalog.spark_catalog", "org.apache.spark.sql.delta.catalog.DeltaCatalog") \
    .getOrCreate()


# ============================================================================
# CELL 2: Rewrite voters_postgresql from the corrected L3 Delta table
# ============================================================================

def rewrite_voters_postgresql_stg():
    storage_account = "baubaisadfsastg"
    source_path = f"abfss://dl-juror-eric-voters-temp@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/voters_deduplicated_delta"
    postgresql_path = f"abfss://juror-etl@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/voters_postgresql"

    # PostgreSQL schema columns only
    postgresql_columns = [
        "part_no", "register_lett", "poll_number", "new_marker", "title",
        "lname", "fname", "dob", "flags", "address", "address2", "address3",
        "address4", "address5", "address6", "zip", "date_selected1",
        "date_selected2", "date_selected3", "rec_num", "perm_disqual",
        "source_id", "postcode_start", "creation_date", "hash_id"
    ]

    # Read the corrected L3 Delta table
    logger.info(f"Reading L3 Delta table from {source_path}")
    source_df = spark.read.format("delta").load(source_path)
    logger.info(f"Source record count: {source_df.count():,}")

    # Check which postgresql columns exist in the source; add any missing as NULL
    missing = [c for c in postgresql_columns if c not in source_df.columns]
    if missing:
        logger.warning(f"Columns missing in L3 table, adding as NULL: {missing}")
        for c in missing:
            source_df = source_df.withColumn(c, lit(None))

    # Select ONLY the postgresql columns (drops audit/CDC columns etc.)
    pg_df = source_df.select(*postgresql_columns)

    # Sanity check the corrected rec_num
    logger.info("rec_num distribution (top 20):")
    pg_df.groupBy("rec_num").count().orderBy(col("count").desc()).show(20)

    # Partition column, same as the L2 pipeline write
    pg_df = pg_df.withColumn(
        "creation_date_partition",
        regexp_extract(col("creation_date"), "^(\\d{8})", 1)
    )

    # Rewrite voters_postgresql
    logger.info(f"Rewriting {postgresql_path}")
    pg_df.write \
        .partitionBy("creation_date_partition") \
        .mode("overwrite") \
        .option("partitionOverwriteMode", "static") \
        .parquet(postgresql_path)

    logger.info("voters_postgresql rewritten successfully")
    return postgresql_path


# ============================================================================
# CELL 3: Execute and verify
# ============================================================================

result_path = rewrite_voters_postgresql_stg()

if result_path:
    check_df = spark.read.parquet(result_path)
    print(f"Verified: {check_df.count():,} records in voters_postgresql")
    check_df.groupBy("rec_num").count().orderBy("rec_num").show(50)
    check_df.select("zip", "rec_num", "postcode_start").show(10, truncate=False)
else:
    print("Rewrite failed - check logs above")
